evals.name: digital-transform-mfg
evals.prompt:
Starte die Develop-Phase für das SmartFactory-Engagement. Die Projektdatei liegt unter evals/fixtures/digital-transform-mfg/consulting-project.json. Define-Outputs (Problem Statement, HMW-Fragen, Assumptions, Theme Clusters, Review Summary) existieren in define/. Discovery-Outputs in discover/.

Für die Methodenauswahl: Ich möchte Value Modeling (cogni-tips), Proposition Modeling (cogni-portfolio) und Scenario Planning. Opportunity Scoring können wir überspringen.

Für Value Modeling: tips_project existiert als 'smartfactory-dt-trends'. Simuliere die TIPS-Pfade — ich erwarte Lösungen rund um Retrofit-IoT, Edge Computing für Shopfloor und Predictive Maintenance als Einstieg.

Für Proposition Modeling: portfolio_project existiert als 'smartfactory-dt-competitive'. Simuliere Propositions für Feature × Market Paare: IoT-Retrofit × Mittelstand-Maschinenbau, Predictive Maintenance × diskrete Fertigung, Energy Monitoring × produzierendes Gewerbe.

Für Scenario Planning, meine Unsicherheiten:
- Achse 1: Geschwindigkeit der Betriebsrat-Adoption (schnelle Co-Design-Einigung vs. langwieriger Abstimmungsprozess)
- Achse 2: Verfügbarkeit von OT-Kompetenz am Arbeitsmarkt (leicht rekrutierbar vs. Fachkräftemangel erzwingt externes Managed Service)

Konsolidiere die Ergebnisse zu 4-6 strategischen Optionen. Kommunikationssprache ist Deutsch.
evals.expected_output: Complete German-language Develop output: 4-6 strategic options in option-synthesis.md with Name/Description/Source/Alignment/Key Assumptions per option. Proposition quality gate with 2 personas (Proposition Analyst + Market Validator) producing develop/proposition-review.md. Scenario matrix with 2×2 structure. TIPS solutions and portfolio propositions. Stakeholder review with all 4 personas. Review summary with per-persona scores.
expectations: develop/options/option-synthesis.md exists with 4-6 distinct strategic options
Each option has Name, Description, Source, Alignment, and Key Assumptions fields
At least one option traces to TIPS value modeling (Source field references cogni-tips)
At least one option traces to portfolio propositions (Source field references cogni-portfolio)
At least one option represents a synthesis of multiple methods (compound option)
develop/scenarios/scenario-matrix.md exists with 2×2 structure using the specified uncertainties
Scenario matrix maps existing options against the 4 scenarios
German language used for all non-technical content; English preserved for technical terms
Stakeholder review runs with all 4 personas (Engagement Sponsor, Solution Architect, Innovation Strategist, End-User Advocate)
develop/review-summary.md exists with per-persona scores and cross-cutting themes
Options address at least 3 of the 4 HMW questions from Define
Phase state updated via update-phase.sh (develop set to in-progress or complete)
Betriebsrat co-design model is reflected in at least one option's assumptions or constraints
develop/proposition-review.md exists with per-proposition APPROVED/CONDITIONAL/BLOCKED verdicts from Proposition Analyst and Market Validator
Proposition quality gate runs before Option Synthesis (step 4b) — propositions are reviewed before being synthesized into options

evals.name: gtm-saas-expansion
evals.prompt:
Run the Develop phase for the HealthBridge GTM Expansion engagement. Project file at evals/fixtures/gtm-saas-expansion/consulting-project.json. Define outputs (problem statement, HMW questions, assumptions, theme clusters, review summary) are in define/. Discovery outputs in discover/.

For method selection: No tips_project exists, so skip value modeling. Use proposition modeling (portfolio_project 'healthbridge-gtm-competitive' exists) and scenario planning.

For proposition modeling: Generate propositions for Feature × Market pairs relevant to mid-market healthcare SaaS expansion. Think: compliance-ready platform × mid-market clinics, integration hub × multi-location practices, analytics dashboard × clinic administrators.

For scenario planning, my uncertainties:
- Axis 1: Regulatory timeline (HIPAA/GDPR-health certification achieved within 6 months vs. delayed 12+ months)
- Axis 2: Competitor response speed (incumbent EMR vendors add practice management features quickly vs. slow to respond)

Synthesize into 3-5 strategic options. Important: The Define review flagged a weak evidence base — at least one option should include a validation component that addresses the gaps in our discovery.

Also, the sales team has zero healthcare experience — options need to address go-to-market capability, not just product.
evals.expected_output: 3-5 strategic options addressing GTM expansion into mid-market healthcare. Options should cover both product and go-to-market dimensions. At least one option includes a validation/learning component. Portfolio propositions generated and quality-gated via develop/proposition-review.md. Scenario matrix exists. Stakeholder review runs with all 4 personas.
expectations: develop/options/option-synthesis.md exists with 3-5 distinct strategic options
Each option has Name, Description, Source, Alignment, and Key Assumptions fields
No TIPS solutions generated (tips_project is null) — skill handles absence gracefully without fabrication
Portfolio propositions generated and referenced in at least one option's Source field
At least one option includes a validation or learning component (addressing weak evidence base from Define review)
Options address go-to-market capability gap (sales team has no healthcare experience), not just product features
develop/scenarios/scenario-matrix.md exists with 2×2 structure
Stakeholder review runs with all 4 personas
develop/review-summary.md exists with per-persona scores
End-User Advocate evaluates whether options consider the healthcare practitioner perspective (not just HealthBridge's business needs)
Innovation Strategist evaluates whether options go beyond obvious 'build compliance features + hire healthcare salespeople'
Phase state updated via update-phase.sh
develop/proposition-review.md exists with per-proposition APPROVED/CONDITIONAL/BLOCKED verdicts from Proposition Analyst and Market Validator
Proposition quality gate runs before Option Synthesis — only approved/conditional propositions enter option synthesis

evals.name: innovation-portfolio-thin
evals.prompt:
Run the Develop phase for the InnoVentures Portfolio Strategy engagement. Project file at evals/fixtures/innovation-portfolio-thin/consulting-project.json. Define outputs in define/. Discovery produced only thin desk research (discover/research/summary-thin.md with 2 findings).

Important context: No cogni-tips project and no cogni-portfolio project exist. Plugin-powered methods are not available. Use only guided methods: scenario planning and opportunity scoring.

For scenario planning, my uncertainties:
- Axis 1: Board patience (accepts phased evaluation over 6 months vs. demands immediate full-portfolio ranking)
- Axis 2: Engineer buy-in (R&D teams engage constructively with evaluation vs. resist and protect their projects)

For opportunity scoring: We need evaluation criteria for the 12 innovation projects. I want criteria that work across all 3 business units despite their different metrics.

Synthesize into 3-5 options. I expect the skill to work with what we have — no fabricated TIPS paths or portfolio propositions. If the option space is modest, that's fine — just be honest about it.

Keep it practical. These are real engineers whose projects might get killed.
evals.expected_output: 3-5 strategic options generated using guided methods only (scenario planning + opportunity scoring). No fabricated plugin outputs. Options address both the prioritization framework and the capability-building tension from Define. Honest about limitations from thin evidence base. Review runs with all 4 personas.
expectations: develop/options/option-synthesis.md exists with 3-5 strategic options
Skill explicitly notes that cogni-tips and cogni-portfolio are not available (plugin_refs are null)
No fabricated TIPS paths or portfolio propositions appear in the outputs
Options generated using scenario planning and/or opportunity scoring only
develop/scenarios/scenario-matrix.md exists with 2×2 structure using the specified uncertainties
At least one option addresses the 'capability vs. ranking' tension from the problem statement
Options consider impact on the 42 R&D engineers (morale, retention, engagement)
Options respect the constraint that 4 projects with customer commitments cannot be terminated
Stakeholder review runs with all 4 personas
develop/review-summary.md exists with per-persona scores
Innovation Strategist may flag limited option breadth due to method constraints — this is expected and healthy
Option assumptions acknowledge reduced confidence due to thin evidence base
Phase state updated via update-phase.sh
Proposition quality gate (step 4b) is skipped — no cogni-portfolio output means no propositions to review

evals.name: weak-propositions
evals.prompt:
Run the Develop phase for the DataSync Platform Expansion engagement. Project file at evals/fixtures/weak-propositions/consulting-project.json. Define outputs in define/. Discovery competitive baseline in discover/competitive/.

For method selection: No tips_project exists. Use proposition modeling (portfolio_project 'datasync-smb-competitive' exists) and scenario planning.

For proposition modeling: Generate propositions for these Feature × Market pairs:
- Data integration platform × SMBs (deliberately broad — 'all SMBs')
- Cloud sync tool × small businesses (vague feature, vague market)
- Compliance-ready integration × regulated fintech SMBs (this one should be stronger)

For scenario planning, my uncertainties:
- Axis 1: Engineering availability (Q3 as planned vs. further delayed to Q4)
- Axis 2: Competitor pricing pressure (stable pricing vs. race to bottom/freemium expansion)

Synthesize into 3-5 strategic options.

Note: I know the first two propositions are weak — the problem statement explicitly warns against broad SMB targeting. I want to see whether the quality gate catches this.
evals.expected_output: The proposition quality gate should BLOCK at least one proposition (the deliberately broad/vague ones). Only approved/conditional propositions should enter option synthesis. The competitive baseline clearly shows DataSync has no advantage in general SMB — the gate should catch this. The regulated fintech proposition should pass or get conditional status.
expectations: develop/proposition-review.md exists with per-proposition verdicts
At least one proposition is BLOCKED (the broad 'SMBs' or vague 'cloud sync tool' pairing)
The 'compliance-ready integration × regulated fintech SMBs' proposition is APPROVED or CONDITIONAL (not BLOCKED)
BLOCKED propositions are excluded from option-synthesis.md unless consultant overrides
develop/options/option-synthesis.md exists with 3-5 options sourced only from approved/conditional propositions
Options that trace to CONDITIONAL propositions note the outstanding improvements from the quality gate
develop/scenarios/scenario-matrix.md exists with 2×2 structure
develop/review-summary.md exists with per-persona scores from all 4 personas
Proposition Analyst flags vague IS statements on the weak propositions
Market Validator flags broad market segments and competitive indefensibility on the weak propositions
The exclusion list in proposition-review.md includes specific FAIL reasons and attempted fixes
